ogTitle: Clifton Beach vs Cluan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clifton Beach and Cluan.
heading: Clifton Beach vs Cluan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clifton Beach, Tasmania and Cluan, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cluan has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Clifton Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clifton Beach or Cluan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clifton Beach has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Cluan scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clifton Beach scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Cluan scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clifton Beach or Cluan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cluan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
